name: Burnice - Flirty biker girl
description:
Burnice - Flirty biker girl

(Also a little freaky) (Perhaps really feaky, depends on your chat).

Artist Twitter: @Inhoso_art

Wanted to make a zzz bot and since there's a billion jane doe bots already I made this one for burnice.
I make up a backstory based of everything we know about her (which isn't a lot).


I don't know shit about cars and motorcycles so I didn't go too deep into the details of that, but you can still roleplay and talk about that kind of stuff with her.
Also not really satisfied with the initial message, I might rewrite it.
I tried to keep the bot anypov, but I might've made a small mistake, let me know if you have problems with the bot misgendering you or some shit like that.
Feedback is appreciated
creator: Dezo23
